steps.name: User is on the signup page
User fills the registration form with details from signup properties
User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account
User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard

name: User Registration
description: This feature validates the signup process for new users on the XATS platform.

elements.name: Successfully request a password reset link

steps.name: User is on the forgot password page
User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link
User should see a confirmation for the reset link

name: Password Recovery
description: This feature validates the forgot password functionality for registered users.

steps.name: User enters username and password from config file

elements.name: Valid user logs in and creates a new client

steps.name: User enters username and password from config file
User navigates to client creation page and adds new client

elements.name: Create a new contact under an existing client

steps.name: User enters username and password from config file
User navigates to client section and adds a new contact
New contact should be created successfully
User enters username and password from config file
user navigates to engagement for client
user adds a note for client
User enters username and password from config file
user navigates to engagement for client
user edits the note for client
User enters username and password from config file
user navigates to engagement for client
user deletes the note for client
User enters username and password from config file
user navigates to engagement for client
user uploads a document for client
User enters username and password from config file
user navigates to engagement for client
user deletes the document for client
User enters username and password from config file

elements.name: Navigate to client and edit two fields

steps.name: user clicks edit button on client
user edits two fields of client
user scrolls and saves client changes

User navigates to job section and adds a new job
